name_cn:
Dynamic Chip N00084 Black Check with Blue M12638 Light Blue M12639 Green M12640 Burgundy M12641 Pink M12642 Dark Blue M12643 Yellow
M12863 Green Embossed M13009 Yellow Embossed M13023 Red Embossed M11497 Dark Blue Embossed M59478 Black Embossed M44494 Damier N40127 Black Check M46354 Black Flower M11482 Silver Flower M12651 Green Print
Top-tier Original Order. This Dopp Kit wash bag is made of Monogram Eclipse coated canvas, offering a subtle choice for Monogram lovers. Ample space to store travel essentials, double zippers provide secure protection, and a wide opening makes it easy to access items.
	•	Monogram Eclipse coated canvas
	•	Washable fabric lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Double zipper closure with magnetic flap cover
	•	Ample capacity
	•	Wide opening
